7. 
While issuing notice by the order dated 22.02.2021, this Court took 
note of the appellant’s submission that the list relied on by the High 
Court wherein the respondent appears at sl. no. 22 is not a seniority 
list but only a list of eligible candidates, and also stayed the operation 
of the impugned order. Further, by order dated 26.04.2024, this Court 
directed the appellant to file an affidavit to the following effect:
(i) 
Whether there was any workable gradation/seniority list of the 
contractually appointed employees like the respondent? 
(ii) 
What was the criteria followed for regular appointment in terms 
of the policy decision? 
(iii) Whether candidates, who have served for less man-days than 
the respondent on contractual basis, have been absorbed on 
regular basis? 
(iv) If so, whether the claim of the respondent was ever considered 
along with such employees? 
(v) 
Whether the respondent can be adjusted against a future
